title: This ‘Dumb’ Phone Is Getting Smarter—But Only a Little!
summary: Do you ever feel like your phone is too distracting? You’re not alone. Some people switch to “dumb phones” that only do basic things like calls and texts. Light Phone is one of the most popular brands. Their newest model, the Light Phone III, has a few extras like a calculator, alarm, and podcast player. But fans kept asking for more—like a QR code scanner or a hiking trail map. The problem? Light Phone is a tiny company, not Apple. They can’t build a million apps. So they came up with a clever idea: let anyone create simple apps, which they call “Tools.” Starting in May, Light Phone is launching a developer program. That means you can build your own Tool, even if you’re a kid learning to code! Some people have already made Tools for guitar tuning, checking bus schedules, or storing gym passes. The company will check each Tool before adding it to their official library, to make sure it fits the “minimal phone” vibe. No email, no social media—that’s what smartphones are for. But you can still sideload any Tool you want by turning on developer mode. The best part? There are no ads, and they don’t sell your data. All Tools are free. Light Phone hopes this will help more people stick with a simpler phone. A recent study even found that switching to a minimal phone can reduce stress and make you happier. So maybe a little bit of smart is just right.
why_it_matters: If you ever feel like your phone takes up too much of your attention, a simple phone like this could help you focus on friends, hobbies, and school more easily.

keywords.explanation: Simple phones that mostly just call and text, with almost no extra apps or internet features.
A tool that can read square barcodes you see on posters or menus to open links or info.
A way for outside people to create new apps or tools for a device, like the Light Phone.
To install an app on a phone by yourself, not from the official app store.
A hidden setting on a device that lets tech-savvy people install apps made outside the official library.
A phone with very few functions, designed to keep distractions away and only perform basic tasks.

questions.question: What is a 'dumb phone'?
options: A phone that can't make calls
A simple phone that mainly does calls and texts
A phone with a broken screen
A phone that only works in one country
questions.correct_answer: A simple phone that mainly does calls and texts

questions.question: What new model did Light Phone release?
options: Light Phone II
Light Phone III
Light Phone Mini
Light Phone Max

questions.question: Why is Light Phone launching a developer program?
options: To let kids play games on the phone
To allow anyone to build simple apps (Tools) because the company is too small to make many itself
To add social media features
To become as big as Apple
questions.correct_answer: To allow anyone to build simple apps (Tools) because the company is too small to make many itself

questions.question: What is true about the Tools on Light Phone?
options: They have many ads
They can be bought for a small fee
They are free and do not sell your data
They only work on weekends
questions.correct_answer: They are free and do not sell your data

questions.question: How can someone install a Tool that is not in the official library?
options: By mailing the company
By turning on developer mode and sideloading it
By paying a subscription
That is not allowed at all
questions.correct_answer: By turning on developer mode and sideloading it

questions.question: What did a recent study mentioned in the article find?
options: Dumb phones make people more stressed
Switching to a minimal phone can reduce stress and make you happier
Smartphones are always better for your health
Light Phone is the best-selling phone
questions.correct_answer: Switching to a minimal phone can reduce stress and make you happier

background_read: Before smartphones, mobile phones were mostly used for calling and texting. Smartphones added apps, internet, and social media—but also many distractions that can make people feel overwhelmed.
Light Phone is a small company that makes 'dumb phones' with only essential features, like the new Light Phone III (the third version of their simple phone).
Now, by letting anyone create simple 'Tools,' Light Phone hopes to keep the phone simple but more useful, without turning it into a distracting smartphone.
Article_Structure: WHO: The Light Phone company and its users
WHAT: Launching a developer program so people can build simple apps (Tools) for the Light Phone III
WHERE: Starting in May, available online for coders anywhere
WHY: Because fans wanted useful extra features like a QR scanner, but the tiny company can't make lots of apps itself, so they're letting the community help

perspectives.description: Many people want to escape constant notifications and ads. This phone gives a break from distraction while still allowing custom tools, making life simpler.
A phone without email, social media, or maps might be too limited for daily life—people might still need a smartphone for many tasks.
The developer program is a clever way for a small company to get more apps without adding complexity, showing how minimal tech can evolve while staying clean.
